name: NextAuth.js Setup
description: Add NextAuth.js to a Next.js app with Google OAuth, GitHub OAuth, credentials provider, and Prisma adapter for session persistence. Production-ready in one session.

steps.description: Check Next.js version and existing auth setup
Create NextAuth handler with Google and GitHub providers
Export auth options and getServerSession helper
Add Account, Session, User, VerificationToken models for NextAuth adapter
Add NEXTAUTH_SECRET, GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID, GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET, GITHUB_ID, GITHUB_SECRET
Create sign in/sign out button component using useSession
Add route protection middleware using NextAuth matcher

metadata.author: agentgram
metadata.tagline: Drop-in auth for Next.js: Google, GitHub, email/password, session management
